vaamar la tiqerav halekha sheri seynakh me'al rigelakh arey atera deat qaim 'alohi atar qadish hu
vaamar ana elaha deavukh elaha deaveraham elaha deyitsechaq velaha deya'aqov ukheveshinun mshe leapohi arey dachil mileisetakala betseyt yeqara dayeya
vaamar yeya migela geli qodamay yat shi'ebud 'ami di vemitserayim veyat qeveletehon shemi'a qodamay min qodam mafelecheyhon arey geley qadamay yat keyveyhon

ukhe'an ita vaashalechinakh levat pare'o veapeyq yat 'ami veney yiserael mimitserayim
vaamar mshe qodam yeya man ana arey ezil levat pare'o vaarey apeyq yat beney yiserael mimitserayim
vaamar arey yehey meymeri vesa'edakh vedeyn lakh ata arey ana shelachetakh beapaqutakh yat 'ama mimitserayim tifelechun qodam yeya 'al tura hadeyn
vaamar mshe qodam yeya ha ana atey levat beney yiserael veeymar lehon elaha deavehatekhon shalechani levatekhon veyeymerun li ma shemeh ma eymar lehon
vaamar yeya lemshe eheye asher eheye vaamar kidenan teymar liveney yiserael eheye shalechani levatekhon

vaamar 'od yeya lemshe kidenan teymar liveney yiserael yeya elaha deavehatekhon elaheh deaveraham elaheh deyitsechaq velaheh deya'aqov shalechani levatekhon deyn shemi le'alam vedeyn dakherani lekhal dar vedar
izeyl vetikhenosh yat savey yiserael veteymar lehon yeya elaha deavehatekhon itegeley li elaheh deaveraham yitsechaq veya'aqov lemeymar midekar dekhirena yatekhon veyat deite'avad lekhon bemitserayim
vaamarit aseyq yatekhon mishi'ebud mitseraey laara' kena'anaey vechitaey veemoraey uferizaey vechivaey vivusaey leare'a 'aveda chalav udevash

viqabelun lemeymerakh veteytey at vesavey yiserael levat maleka demitserayim veteymerun leh yeya elaha dihudaey iteqerey 'alana ukhe'an nezeyl ke'an mahalakh telata yomin bemadebera unedabach qodam yeya elahana
uqedamay geley arey la yisheboq yatekhon maleka demitserayim lemeyzal vela min qodam decheyleh taqif
vaashalach pon yat mechat gevureti veemechey yat mitseraey bekhol perishevati di a'ebed beyneyhon uvatar ken yeshalach yatekhon
veeten yat 'ama hadeyn lerachamin be'eyney mitseraey vihey arey tehakhun la tehakhun reyqanin
vetisheal iteta mishevavetah umiqerivat beytah manin dikhesaf umanin didehav ulevushin uteshavun 'al beneykhon ve'al benateykhon uteroqinun yat mitserayim
vaateyv mshe vaamar veha la yehemenun li vela yeqabelun mini arey yeymerun la itegeley lakh yeya
vaamar leh yeya ma deyn bidakh vaamar chutera
vaamar remihi leare'a uremahi leare'a vahava lechivey va'araq mshe min qodamohi
vaamar yeya lemshe oshit yedakh veechod bezaneveh veosheyt yedeh veateqef beh vahava lechutera bideh
bedil dihemenun arey itegeli lakh yeya elaha deavehatehon elaheh deaveraham elaheh deyitsechaq veelaheh deya'aqov
vaamar yeya leh 'od a'eyl ke'an yedakh be'itefakh vea'eyl yedeh be'itefeh veafeqah veha yedeh chavera khetalega
vaamar ateyv yedakh le'itefakh vaateyv yedeh le'itefeh veafeqah me'itefeh veha tavat havat kevisereh

vihey im la yehemenun af litereyn ataya haileyn vela yeqabelun minakh vetisav mimaya divenahara veteshod leyabesheta vihon maya di tisav min nahara vihon lidema beyabesheta
vaamar mshe qodam yeya beva'u yeya la gevar demilul ana af mitemali af mideqamohi af me'idan demaleleta 'im 'avedakh arey yaqir mamelal ve'amiq lishan ana
vaamar yeya leh man shavi puma laanasha o man shavi ilema o cheresha o fiqecha o 'avira hala ana yeya
ukhe'an ezeyl umeymeri yehe 'im pumakh vealefinakh di temalel

uteqeyf rugeza dayeya bemshe vaamar hala aharon achukh levaey geley qodamay arey malala yemalel hu veaf ha hu nafeq leqadamutakh veyechezinakh veyechedey velibeh

vaamar yeya lemshe bemideyan ezeyl tuv lemitserayim arey mitu kal guveraya dive'o lemiqetelakh
udevar mshe yat iteteh veyat benohi vearekevinun 'al chamara vetav leare'a demitserayim unesiv mshe yat chutera deite'avidu beh nisin min qodam yeya bideh
